Create links

Command Flags:

  --ask : Whether to ask before making changes
    type : string
    choices : [true false dry-run]
    default : true
    required : true
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : true

  --dotfiles : Files/dirs starting with 'dot-' will have links starting with '.'
    type : bool
    default : true
    required : true
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : true

  --ignore , -i : Ignore file/dir if the name (not the whole path) matches passed regex
    type : string
    default : [README.*]
    unsetsentinel : UNSET
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) :
      0) README.*

  --link-dir , -l : Symlinks will be created in this directory pointing to files/directories in --src-dir
    type : path
    default : ~
    required : true
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : ~

  --src-dir , -s : Directory containing files and directories to link to
    type : path
    required : true

Global Flags:

  --color : Use ANSI colors
    type : string
    choices : [true false auto]
    default : auto
    envvars : [WARG_COLOR]
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : auto

  --help , -h : Print help
    type : string
    choices : [allcommands compact default detailed outline]
    default : default
    currentvalue (set by passedflag) : detailed

  --term-width : Terminal width. Should be a positive integer, "auto", or "infinite". If "auto" the app will attempt to detect terminal width and fall back to 120 if detection fails
    type : string
    default : auto
    envvars : [WARG_TERM_WIDTH]
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : auto
